summary: Decomp/matching PR focused on Ice Mountain stage code in gricemt. It substantially rewrote src/melee/gr/gricemt.c, adjusted Ice Mountain ground-var and parameter types, updated gricemt prototypes, and changed one symbols.txt text symbol boundary. The bot report records 13 new gricemt matches, 11 partial improvements, and one broken 4-byte match from fn_801F91A4 being absorbed into fn_801F9150 symbol sizing.

key_files.role: Primary Ice Mountain stage decomp/matching work; added typed data, HSD_ASSERT usage, recovered callbacks/helpers, icemt/icemt2 field accesses, local stack-shape tactics, and function bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.c include additions baselib/debug.h and baselib/forward.h
raw_diff: grIceMt_801F686C HSD_ASSERT conversion and bg_gobj naming
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports 13 new matches and 11 improvements in main/melee/gr/gricemt

key_files.role: Ground-vars layout recovery for grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2, including corrected offset comments, padding, and moving HSD_GObj* array ownership to icemt2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars comments changed from repeated +0 gp+C4/+D8 to explicit offsets

key_files.role: Header/prototype cleanup for recovered Ice Mountain signatures and IceMountainParams fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: IceMountainParams xB0/xB4 changed from float to s16*
raw_diff: fn_801F8E58, fn_801F9150, grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801FA0BC, grIceMt_801FA500 prototypes updated

key_files.role: Symbol metadata adjusted for neighboring function boundary around fn_801F9150/fn_801F91A4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801F9150 size changed from 0x54 to 0x58 and fn_801F91A4 entry removed
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_801F91A4 as one broken match, -4 bytes

what_changed.text: Recovered or improved multiple Ice Mountain functions, with bot-reported 100% matches for fn_801F9338, fn_801F9448, fn_801F9558, grIceMt_801F7F70, grIceMt_801F83EC, grIceMt_801F8B10, grIceMt_801F796C, fn_801F9150, grIceMt_801F865C, grIceMt_801FA7F0, grIceMt_801F8208, grIceMt_801F8850, and grIceMt_801F7D94.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report, 13 new matches

what_changed.text: Updated Ice Mountain data declarations: Vec3 table became const, IceMtRowData fields x4/x8 became f32 and received concrete initializer rows, and small helper structs GrIm588/GrIm825C were introduced for copied stack data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: IceMtRowData x4/x8 u32 to f32 and grIm_803E4068 initializer
raw_diff: typedef GrIm588 and GrIm825C additions

what_changed.text: Replaced several raw __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT while preserving source file line numbers such as 0x27C, 0x27D, 0x475, 0x4C3, 0x4C5, 0x78F, and 0xBB2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7A2C HSD_ASSERT(0x4C3, mgobj) and HSD_ASSERT(0x4C5, jobj)

what_changed.text: Corrected several field accesses from unrelated or less accurate union arms to Ice Mountain-specific arms, including corneria to icemt and object arrays to icemt2.xF8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F7728 uses gp->gv.icemt instead of gp->gv.corneria
raw_diff: destroy callbacks use gp->gv.icemt2.xF8 instead of gp->gv.icemt.xF8

what_changed.text: Cleaned some generated-looking constants and data-symbol references by inlining 0.0f instead of grIm_804DB574 in state reset/clamp code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_801F785C assigns 0.0f to xE4 and xD4

what_changed.text: Updated header signatures to match recovered function bodies, removing UNK_RET for grIceMt_801FA0BC and changing several helper callback signatures.
Adjusted symbols.txt so fn_801F9150 spans 0x58 bytes and fn_801F91A4 is no longer a separate 4-byte function entry.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report broken fn_801F91A4 match

smart_moves.text: Used header prototype updates alongside body recovery, keeping call sites and declarations aligned instead of relying on local casts alone.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.c call sites pass &gp->gv.icemt and HSD_JObj* arguments

smart_moves.text: Replaced unrelated GroundVars union-arm accesses with Ice Mountain-specific fields, improving type expression and reviewability.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: icemt2.xF8 used for material object arrays

smart_moves.text: Mapped expanded assert code to HSD_ASSERT with matching line numbers, reducing decompiler noise while preserving assertion evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert blocks replaced by HSD_ASSERT in grIceMt_801F686C and grIceMt_801F7A2C

smart_moves.text: Used local role names such as bg_gobj, mgobj, jobj, and gp where roles are clear, while leaving address-style global/function names where semantics remain unproven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gobj renamed bg_gobj in grIceMt_801F686C
raw_diff: retained grIceMt_801F* and grIm_* names

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage-specific GroundVars union arm is known, use that arm rather than borrowing fields from another stage arm; this PR repeatedly moved accesses from corneria or ambiguous icemt fields into icemt/icemt2 fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gp->gv.icemt.xF8 uses replaced with gp->gv.icemt2.xF8

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered bodies should be paired with truthful header prototypes; gricemt.h was updated for proven helper signatures instead of leaving UNK_RET or stale argument lists.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET grIceMt_801FA0BC changed to void grIceMt_801FA0BC(s16*)
raw_diff: grIceMt_801FA500 changed to take HSD_GObj* and HSD_JObj*

decomp_lessons.lesson: Assert cleanup can be reliable when file-local line numbers are preserved through existing macros such as HSD_ASSERT.
Do not keep named float data symbols when the diff only shows ordinary scalar constants; this PR replaced grIm_804DB574 uses with inline 0.0f in several expressions.

naming_conventions.meaning: Local HSD_GObj* for background/topi setup object in grIceMt_801F686C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_GObj* gobj changed to HSD_GObj* bg_gobj

naming_conventions.meaning: Local HSD_GObj* fetched by Ground_801C2BA4 and asserted before Ground_801C4A08.
Stage-specific GroundVars union arms used for Ice Mountain state and secondary jobj/gobj arrays.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h struct grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2

naming_conventions.meaning: Address-style names retained where the diff does not prove semantic names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: retained function/global names throughout gricemt.c and gricemt.h

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: Several functions added narrow PAD_STACK calls, including PAD_STACK(0x10), PAD_STACK(8), and PAD_STACK(0x4), apparently to satisfy stack shape for matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence shows bot match results but not per-function objdiff rationale for each PAD_STACK.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Stack struct copies from small data records
assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: Functions copy GrIm588, GrIm825C, or anonymous two-u32 structs into stack locals before passing them as s16* joint index lists.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GrIm588 sp14 = grIm_804DB588/grIm_804DB58C then grIceMt_801F8CDC
raw_diff: GrIm825C sp14 copies grIm_803B825C fields
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Useful as observed matching tactic, but broad data ownership of those externs is not established by this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: Merged a 4-byte fn_801F91A4 entry into fn_801F9150 by expanding fn_801F9150 from 0x54 to 0x58 in symbols.txt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt fn_801F9150 size change and fn_801F91A4 deletion
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_801F91A4 broken, -4 bytes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The bot report treats fn_801F91A4 as broken after the metadata change; intake cannot infer reviewer intent beyond the diff.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: JObj translation operations use existing HSD_JObjSetTranslateY/GetTranslationY helpers instead of expanded field/assert code.
grIceMt_801FA500 uses a while loop to walk JObj child/next/parent links while counting until a target JObj is found.
evidence_refs: raw_diff around grIceMt_801FA500: while (jobj != NULL), HSD_JObjGetChild/GetNext/GetParent, count++
metadata_json: PR metadata, state MERGED, changed file counts
raw_diff: full local diff available but loaded excerpt was truncated; targeted read/grep used for gricemt.h and types.h hunks
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with match deltas
text_corpus: no PR body content, no review comments
notes: Strong evidence for changed files, symbol/prototype/type diffs, and bot-reported match deltas.
No human review comments were present in the loaded slice, so review_feedback is empty.
The bot report is evidence of reported matching progress, but the slice does not include per-symbol objdiff logs or build commands.
The diff is large and initially truncated in the loaded context; only targeted additional diff sections were inspected for header/type details.
Data ownership for newly declared extern/static data records is not fully proven by this intake slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use stage-specific GroundVars union arms when recovered
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2531 repeatedly replaces borrowed or ambiguous field accesses with Ice Mountain-specific icemt/icemt2 accesses, including corneria.xC8 to icemt.xC8 and icemt.xF8 to icemt2.xF8, aligning with typed-fields-over-pointer-math.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: material cleanup loops use gp->gv.icemt2.xF8

accepted_candidate_records.title: Pair recovered gricemt bodies with header prototype cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2531 updates gricemt.h prototypes for recovered helpers, removing stale UNK_RET and changing argument lists where body/callsite evidence supports the signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801F8E58 and fn_801F9150 signatures become s32 callbacks with s32* out parameter
raw_diff: grIceMt_801FA0BC changes from UNK_RET to void

accepted_candidate_records.title: Narrow stack shaping in gricemt
accepted_candidate_records.text: Several newly matched or improved gricemt functions use small PAD_STACK entries and stack-local copied structs before helper calls. Keep this as a tactic requiring narrow verifier evidence, not general style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GrIm588/GrIm825C/anonymous stack locals passed to grIceMt_801F8CDC

source_update_candidates.title: gricemt paths are Ice Mountain stage ground code and type headers
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/gr/gricemt.c and src/melee/gr/gricemt.h contain Ice Mountain stage functions and parameters; src/melee/gr/types.h contains grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2 layouts used by those functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grIceMt_GroundVars and grIceMt_GroundVars2 in types.h
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful searchable path fact, but source-owned path facts should be curated separately.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate grIm_* data ownership in gricemt
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2531 introduces/changes several grIm_* data declarations and externs, including grIm_803E4068, grIm_804DB588, grIm_804DB58C, grIm_804DB590 through grIm_804DB5A4, and grIm_803B825C. Curator may want a data-ownership note only after checking section/symbol metadata outside this slice.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR slice shows data declaration changes but not enough section metadata to accept a data ownership rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that PAD_STACK is generally acceptable in gricemt; the slice only supports that it was used here alongside bot-reported matches.
Do not treat fn_801F91A4 deletion as a universal symbol-splitting rule; the evidence only shows this one symbols.txt boundary change and bot-reported 4-byte broken match.
Do not claim human reviewer approval rationale; no review comments were present.
Do not promote semantic names for grIceMt_801F* or grIm_* symbols beyond what the diff itself names.
